Title: Create Activity with all required fields
Preconditions: User logged in as Editor, on Activities page
Steps:
1. Click 'Create Activity'
2. Select CEFR Level 'Level 2 Beginner'
3. Verify Unit dropdown populates
4. Select Unit 'Unit 3 Travel and Transportation'
5. Verify Topic dropdown populates
6. Select Topic 'Getting There'
7. Hover over Topic info icon
8. Select Activity Type 'Grammar'
9. Select Lesson Type 'Grammar'
10. Enter Title 'Present Tense Practice'
11. Enter Number of Questions '5'
12. Verify Time per Question defaults to 30
13. Click 'Create'
Expected Result: Activity created with status 'Draft', user redirected to question creation screen

Title: Cannot create activity without required Title
Steps:
1. Click 'Create Activity'
2. Fill all fields EXCEPT Title
3. Click 'Create'
Expected Result: Form does not submit, validation error on Title field

Title: Activity title enforces 30 character maximum
Steps:
1. Type exactly 30 characters in Title
2. Attempt to type 31st character
Expected Result: Input stops at 30 characters, character counter shows '30/30'

Title: Activity types with 60 character title limit
Steps:
1. Select Activity Type (Text-to-Image/Speaking/Spelling/Vocabulary/Listening)
2. Type 60 characters in Title
3. Attempt to type 61st character
Expected Result: Input stops at 60 characters

Title: Grammar Activity - Grammar rules screen
Preconditions: Grammar activity created, on Grammar Rules screen
Steps:
1. Enter Short Grammar Rule
2. Enter Long Grammar Rule
3. Enter Example Sentence 1
4. Enter Example Sentence 2
5. Click 'Next'
Expected Result: User proceeds to Questions screen, grammar rules saved

Title: Memory Game requires exactly 6 pairs
Steps:
1. Fill Word/Phrase for only 5 pairs
2. Upload images for 5 pairs
3. Enter Image Source for 5 pairs
4. Attempt to click 'Approve for Translation'
Expected Result: Button disabled or error shown, message indicates 6 pairs required

Title: Memory Game can be saved with words only
Steps:
1. Enter Word/Phrase for all 6 pairs
2. Do NOT upload any images
3. Click 'Save and Continue'
Expected Result: Activity saves successfully, can return later to add images

Title: Natural Conversations has dual instruction fields
Steps:
1. Verify two instruction fields exist
2. Enter Instructions for Listen
3. Enter Instructions for Speak
4. Verify separate native language toggles
5. Save question
Expected Result: Both instruction sets saved with independent settings

Title: Spelling Activity has 10 character answer limit
Steps:
1. Type 'automobile' (10 chars) in Word/Phrase
2. Attempt to type 11th character
Expected Result: Input stops at 10 characters, different from other types

Title: Open Writing has 98 character question limit
Steps:
1. Type exactly 98 characters in Question
2. Attempt to type 99th character
Expected Result: Input stops at 98 characters, different from standard 80

Title: Audio-to-Image requires audio upload
Steps:
1. Enter Instructions and Audio Transcript
2. Do NOT upload audio
3. Upload answer images
4. Click 'Save and Continue'
Expected Result: Save blocked, error 'Audio file required'

Title: Instructions field 80 char limit - all types
Steps:
1. Type 80 characters in Instructions
2. Attempt to type 81st character
Expected Result: Input stops at 80 characters for ALL activity types

Title: Answer field 38 character limit
Steps:
1. Type 38 characters in Correct Answer
2. Attempt to type 39th character
Expected Result: Input stops at 38 characters

Title: Spelling Answer 10 character limit
Steps:
1. Type 10 characters in Word/Phrase
2. Attempt to type 11th character
Expected Result: Input stops at 10 characters - UNIQUE to Spelling

Title: Paste behavior when exceeding limit
Steps:
1. Copy 100 characters to clipboard
2. Paste into Instructions (80 char limit)
Expected Result: Only first 80 characters pasted OR paste blocked with warning

Title: New activity starts with Draft status
Steps:
1. Create new Grammar activity
2. Save with all required fields
3. Check activity status
Expected Result: Activity status is 'Draft'

Title: Draft to In Translation transition
Preconditions: Activity in Draft, all questions saved
Steps:
1. Open activity with all questions
2. Click 'Approve for Translation'
3. Verify popup appears
4. Check status
Expected Result: Status changes to 'In Translation', popup shows confirmation

Title: Cannot approve with incomplete questions
Steps:
1. Create activity with 5 questions
2. Save only 3 questions
3. Attempt to approve
Expected Result: Button disabled or error, message about completing questions

Title: Edit resets status to Draft
Steps:
1. Open activity for editing
2. Change any question field
3. Save changes
Expected Result: Status RESETS to 'Draft'

Title: Access Topic Builder and select topic
Steps:
1. Click 'Topic Builder' from menu
2. Select Level
3. Select Unit
4. Select Topic
5. Click 'Next'
Expected Result: Topic Builder screen displayed with Activities picker

Title: Reorder activities with drag and drop
Steps:
1. Drag activity #3 to position #1
2. Release
Expected Result: Order updates to [3,1,2], visual feedback during drag

Title: View pending translations
Steps:
1. Access Translator interface
2. Set Status filter to 'Waiting for Translation'
Expected Result: Table shows columns: Activity Name, Type, Level, Unit, Topic, Lesson

Title: Complete translation status change
Steps:
1. Complete all required translations
2. Mark as 'Ready to Use'
Expected Result: Status changes from 'Waiting' to 'Ready to Use'

Title: Upload valid image formats
Steps:
1. Click 'Upload Image'
2. Select valid JPEG image
Expected Result: Image uploads, thumbnail preview displayed

Title: Upload valid MP3 audio
Steps:
1. Click 'Upload Audio'
2. Select valid .mp3 file
Expected Result: Audio uploads, playback control available

Title: Reject invalid image format
Steps: 1. Attempt to upload .txt file as image
Expected Result: Upload rejected, error 'Invalid file format'

Title: Level to Unit cascade
Steps:
1. Select Level 'Level 2 Beginner'
2. Observe Unit dropdown
Expected Result: Unit dropdown populates with Level 2 units only

Title: Unit to Topic cascade
Steps:
1. Select Unit 'Unit 3'
2. Observe Topic dropdown
Expected Result: Topic dropdown populates with Unit 3 topics only

Title: Submit without required distractor
Steps:
1. Fill Question and Correct Answer
2. Leave ALL distractors empty
3. Click 'Save and Continue'
Expected Result: Save blocked, error 'At least one distractor required'

Title: Memory Game fewer than 6 pairs
Steps:
1. Fill only 4 pairs with words and images
2. Click 'Approve for Translation'
Expected Result: Cannot approve, error 'requires exactly 6 pairs'

Title: Special characters in text fields
Steps:
1. Enter 'Héllo! ¿Cómo estás? 你好' in Instructions
2. Save and reload
Expected Result: Special characters preserved without encoding issues

Title: Fill-in-blank underscore insertion
Steps:
1. Type 'He ___ a car'
2. Use blank insert tool (if available)
Expected Result: Blank (___) inserted correctly, displays in preview
